paymentScheduleLinkForCollectionPlan.title: paymentScheduleLinkForCollectionPlan
paymentScheduleLinkForCollectionPlan.description: Link to the created PaymentSchedule record. Show this as a link that can be used to navigate to the PaymentSchedule record.

statusMessage.title: statusMessage
statusMessage.description: Stores a text message indicating the flow execution status. This variable is available as output from the flow.
